# !/usr/bin/python 
# -*- coding: utf8 -*- 
# Puzzle RPA version: 2.2.3 
# remote
def downRange(start, stop, step):

    while start >= stop:
        yield start
        start -= abs(step)
def upRange(start, stop, step):

    while start <= stop:
        yield start
        start += abs(step)
